findings.title: Potential authentication bypass due to unconditional isAllowed method
findings.file_path: package com.app.security;  public class AuthFilter {     public boolean isAllowed(String user) {         /Authfilter.java
findings.message: The isAllowed method now unconditionally returns true, potentially allowing unauthorized access.
findings.recommendation: Review the AuthFilter class to ensure that the unconditional return value is intentional and secure.
